posts.author: Buendia (Casey Caniglia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, Monday!

We use automated notifications to call attention to problems and successes. It would be great if these automated notifications could contain an image/file/GIF in order to spice things up or to provide a next step file to the user.

Thank you!
